title: I Have Nothing Left To Say Lyrics Adhe Kangal 2017
stanzas: <div>I Have Nothing Left To Say Lyrics #AdheKangal 2017

Look at what you have done
clouded the morning sun
I would have shined for you
but now that i have
learned the truth

I wont let you break me down
I will take what I still have
and get out
when you're falling deep asleep
I'll be there haunting
in your dreams

you should know when you
left me alone
the silence of sound.

I have nothing left to say
you have taken it all away
for all the scars and
all the pain
I am never coming back now

we have nothing left to do
I have all of my heart to you
perhaps i fell in love too soon
or maybe you brought us down

tears have fallen like the rain
and lighting struck my soul
but i have found my strenth again
and I wont take it anymore

every day I am reminded
of what we could have been
every moment comes back
to me each time I let you in

there is a fire
growing inside me and
its header you way

all of this madness
could have been ended
if you has just stayed

I have nothing left to say
you have taken it all away
for all the scars and
all the pain
I am never coming back now

we have nothing left to do
I have all of my heart to you
perhaps i fell in love too soon

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of heartbreak and the struggle to move on after a painful relationship.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Adhe Kangal, this song reflects the protagonist's emotional journey and the impact of betrayal.

Who are the artists behind this song?

The song features vocals by Addie Nicole and Jah Mil, with lyrics by Addie Nicole and music composed by M Ghibran.

When was the song released?

The song was published on January 24, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song I Have Nothing Left To Say from Adhe Kangal delves into the emotional aftermath of a broken relationship. It conveys a sense of melancholy and introspection, as the lyrics reflect on betrayal and the struggle to reclaim one's strength. The haunting melody, combined with the poignant vocals, evokes feelings of sadness and resilience. This track serves as a powerful reminder of the complexities of love and loss.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: I Have Nothing Left To Say from the Adhe Kangal soundtrack is a haunting melody that captures the essence of heartbreak and solitude. With the unique collaboration of Addie Nicole's soulful voice and Jah Mil's captivating style, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has faced emotional turmoil. M Ghibran's masterful composition elevates the lyrical depth, making it a must-listen for fans of poignant Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: Look at what you have done, blocking the morning sun. I would have shined for you, but now I know the truth.
I won't let you break me down. I'll take what I have left and leave. When you're deeply asleep, I'll be there haunting your dreams.
You should know, when you left me alone, there was silence.
I have nothing left to say. You have taken everything away. For all the scars and pain, I'm never coming back now.
We have nothing left to do. I gave you all my heart. Maybe I fell in love too soon, or maybe you brought us down.
Tears have fallen like rain, and lightning struck my soul. But I've found my strength again, and I won't take it anymore.
Every day I'm reminded of what we could have been. Every moment comes back to me each time I let you in.
There is a fire growing inside me, and it's heading your way.
All of this madness could have ended if you had just stayed.
I have nothing left to say. You have taken everything away. For all the scars and pain, I'm never coming back now.
We have nothing left to do. I gave you all my heart. Maybe I fell in love too soon, or maybe you brought us down.
